name: SOCIAL MEDIA PROFILE SETUP — 5 NICHES x ALL PLATFORMS
description: Build complete setup packages for 5 social media profiles across all relevant platforms. Each task spawns parallel agents via TeamCreate. Human just creates accounts and uploads.

tasks.name: Bio & handle generator (5 profiles x all platforms)
tasks.description: Optimized bios for all 5 profiles respecting per-platform char limits. 5 agents (1 per profile).

tasks.name: Profile photo & banner AI prompts
tasks.description: Midjourney/Leonardo/DALL-E prompts for profile photos + banners for all 5 profiles. 3 agents.

tasks.name: Sleep/Wellness content batch (gap fill)
tasks.description: 50 tweets + 50 short-form + 30-day calendar + 10 article outlines for @SleepMaxx. 4 agents.

tasks.name: Content distribution scripts
tasks.description: Python scripts: calendar -> Buffer CSV, Later CSV, Medium markdown, Substack markdown, Beehiiv HTML. 5 agents.

tasks.name: Warmup schedule generator
tasks.description: 28-day warmup plan per platform per account. CSV + printable checklist. 3 agents.

tasks.name: Newsletter setup package
tasks.description: Beehiiv/Substack configs, welcome sequence HTML, lead magnet specs, signup form copy. 3 agents.

tasks.name: Human account creation master checklist
tasks.description: Single unified doc: ~40 accounts, step-by-step with URLs, settings. Updates ACCOUNTS.csv. 4 agents.

tasks.name: Scheduling + cross-promotion map + session handoff
tasks.description: Posting times per platform, cross-promo strategy, Linktree configs, handoff doc. 3 agents.
